ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( QuoteApproved__c = False, ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( Status ), "Draft") , OR( ISPICKVAL(Status , "In Review") , ISPICKVAL(Status , "Approved") , ISPICKVAL(Status , "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(Status , "Presented") , ISPICKVAL(Status , "Accepted") , ISPICKVAL(Status , "Denied") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Falta la aprobacion interna del presupuesto
